name: Adrián Infantes Romero
role: AI Security Architect | AI/ML Engineer | Blue Cyber AI
text:
I operate on the front line where AI becomes either a strategic asset or a critical vulnerability.

With over 7 years of experience, I've evolved from Data Scientist to AI Security Architect at BBVA's Financial Intelligence Unit. My specialty: designing, auditing, and fortifying AI systems to survive in hostile, regulated, and high-risk environments.

My approach transcends traditional MLOps. I focus on Offensive and Defensive AI Engineering: ensuring that GenAI capabilities, LLMs, and predictive systems are resistant to adversarial attacks, manipulation, and data exfiltration before operational deployment.

Philosophy: Defense in Depth applied to AI. An autonomous agent without hardening is an unacceptable risk.
quote: The real challenge isn't the model's intelligence, but its robustness and control.

goals.text: Lead AI Security teams in critical environments
Contribute to AI security standards (OWASP, MITRE ATLAS)
